titleStmt.title: SII 27.229: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 229. (A.R. No. 308 of 1931-32.) ĀVARŚE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone standing in ‘Hanubinemalla-gadde’ at the hamlet Kirāḍi.

The record registers a gift of land by mahāpradhāna Siṅgaṇsāhaṇi together with Baṁchana-hegaḍe and another seṭṭi of Kiṟuhāḍe to Mādhava-kalukura, son of Śiva-kalukura with a stipulation that the donee had to pay a specified sum of money regularly to god Kōṭīśvaradēva.
It is dated the cyclic year Rudhirōdgārin, Kanyā 12, Saturday. These details correspond to 1323 A.D., September 10.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu pāṁḍyacakravartti Arirāya
basavasaṁkhara śrīmat sōyidēvāḷpēṁdradēvara
saru vijaya rājyaṁgeyyuttirddu mahāpradhānaṁ siṁga
ṇa sāhaṇi rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsarada kaṁnyā māsaṁ ha
neraḍuneya sanivāradaṁdu kiṟuhāḍeya baṁcaṇa
heggaḍe yaḷḷaseṭi tamoḷēkastharāgi sivakalukurana maga mā
dhavakalkuraṁge dhārāpūrbbakavāgi darṁmabrahmadāyada
bāḷanukoṭṭaru Ā bāḷiṁge kaṭṭuṁdeṟu kōṭēśvaradēvariṁge
1 kaṁ pa 3 varuṣaṁ pratikoṭṭu gaṁḍiṁge mula heṁṇiṁ
ṁge dānavāgi tettu bāḷvarānuyiṁtappudakke A
yidakke tappidaḍe vāraṇā
siyalu ṁdu kavileya vadhisi
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
